title: valuation-sanity-check output
description: Canonical structured output for the valuation-sanity-check skill. Layer 1 (the data); Layer 2 (rendered flash note) is described in references/rendering.md.

tier.description: Data fidelity: A=paid Stocks Starter+ (unlimited REST, full peer fanout); B=free Basic (rate-limited, curated override only).

tier_caveats.description: Human-readable caveats applicable to the chosen tier.

run_at.description: UTC timestamp when the sanity check was run.

current_ev.description: Current enterprise value = current_mcap + long_term_debt. USD.

shares_outstanding.description: Diluted or basic shares outstanding as reported by /v3/reference/tickers.

long_term_debt.description: Most recent reported long-term debt. USD.

revenue_growth_ttm.description: TTM revenue growth vs prior TTM. Decimal.

assumed_growth.description: Assumed revenue CAGR over the horizon. Decimal (0.28 = 28%).

multiple_sanity.description: Per multiple: target-implied value vs peer 25/50/75 percentile band. Status: in_line (inside band), above (above p75), below (below p25).

implied_value.description: Target-implied multiple. For EV/Sales and EV/EBITDA, computed at the horizon revenue / EBITDA (analyst's assumptions). For P/E, computed at horizon EPS implied by margin × revenue / shares.

status.description: in_line: target-implied inside the p25-p75 band; above: > p75; below: < p25; n_a: insufficient data.

n_peers_in_distribution.description: Peers contributing to the distribution. Nulls dropped.

growth_sanity.description: Analyst-assumed revenue growth vs peer TTM revenue growth distribution.

margin_sanity.description: Analyst-assumed EBITDA margin vs peer TTM EBITDA margin distribution.

reverse_dcf.description: At the current stock price, given the assumed margin, what 5y revenue CAGR is implied? Simplified single-stage model; see references/reverse-dcf.md.

current_ev.description: Current EV used as the PV target.

wacc_assumption.description: Discount rate. Hardcoded at 0.09 (9%) for v1; see references/reverse-dcf.md.

exit_multiple_assumption.description: Peer-median EV/EBITDA used as the terminal exit multiple.

implied_cagr.description: Solved revenue CAGR such that PV(horizon EBITDA × exit multiple) = current EV. Decimal.

peer_median_cagr.description: Peer median revenue growth used as the comparison. TTM proxy in v1; documented.

air_pp.description: (implied_cagr - peer_median_cagr) × 100. Percentage points of 'air' in the current price.

fair_value_at_peer_median.description: What the share price would be if you keep the assumed margin but trim growth to peer median. USD/share.

peers_used.description: Per-peer summary of what fed the distributions. Subject excluded.

take.description: One-paragraph bold take at the top of the rendered note. Translates the target into 'NVDA grows X% CAGR at Y% margin for N years' framing, then flags the peer-median gap. Banker-tone, no hedge words.

read.description: Closing read at the bottom. If you trim assumptions to peer median, where does the target land? One or two sentences.

sources.description: All Massive endpoints called during the run, with fetched-at timestamps for audit.
